title: lilium carniolicum subsp. jankae
intro: Lilium carniolicum subsp. jankae, also known as Jankae's Carniolan lily, is a subspecies of the Lilium carniolicum plant, a type of lily native to the mountainous regions of Slovenia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Consuming the plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as protecting against infections. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
